mapper.select: SELECT org_id AS orgId, parent_id AS parentId, name, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn FROM orgs ORDER BY parent_id NULLS FIRST, sort_order ASC, org_id ASC
SELECT org_id AS orgId, parent_id AS parentId, name, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn FROM orgs ORDER BY org_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orgs(parent_id, name, sort_order, use_yn) VALUES(#{parentId}, #{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn})
